form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a one length second but did clock a slick 29.93 over the 520m trip. Expected to push the clock again here.

form.formComment: Last start finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 520m at this track behind Strip Weathers beaten 6 lengths (30.55). Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 520m. Has failed to show enough to come into contention.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Mandurah over 400m in 22.37. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 520m at this track at Grade 5 level. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 520m at this track. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.53) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 13 length sixth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from four starts. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.
